Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Кожні вміння та атаки мають {f 0 1 2}спорідненість{f 0 1 27}, і вороги мають слабкості до певних спорідненостей.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 3}Attacking an enemy with its weakness will deal more damage than usual. It will also knock the enemy down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 4}When an enemy is down, you'll be able to act {f 0 1 2}1 More{f 0 1 27} time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you use this extra action to knock down a different enemy, you can act 1 More time again. As long as you keep knocking the enemies down, you'll be able to attack continuously.[n]{f 1 1}
